title: Complimentary Craft Cocktail
description: Redeem for one house craft cocktail on your next visit during bar hours.

title: VIP Table Reservation
description: Guaranteed table for two on a Friday or Saturday night — no wait, no stress.

title: Mixology Class Pass
description: Free entry to any upcoming mixology workshop hosted at the lounge.

title: Bartender's Choice Flight
description: Let the house bartender curate a 4-pour tasting flight for you.

title: Spirits Tasting Night Guest Pass
description: Bring a friend for free to the next exclusive spirits tasting evening.

title: Early Market Bar Access
description: Skip the line with early-door access on Eastern Market weekends.

title: Private Event Consultation
description: One-on-one session with a host to plan your next private event or tasting.

title: Featured Guest at Live Tasting
description: Join the next live-streamed tasting event as a featured guest participant.

title: Ambassador Cocktail Kit
description: Curated kit of premium spirits and garnishes delivered for at-home mixing.

title: Pop-Up Bar Ticket
description: Exclusive access to the next UNP pop-up bar experience in Detroit.
